items.title: Polish-Based GRAI Secures €7.65M Seed Funding
items.body: Polish-based GRAI has successfully secured €7.65 million in seed funding to develop its AI-powered music remix platform, showcasing the growing investment interest in CEE tech startups.

items.title: Polish Warsaw Equity Group Leads €5M Series A
items.body: The Polish Warsaw Equity Group has led a €5 million Series A funding round in collaboration with Porsche Ventures, highlighting the active investment landscape in the CEE region.

items.title: Bulgarian Codery Acquires Elfshock
items.body: Bulgarian-founded Codery has announced the acquisition of Elfshock, specializing in robotic process automation and AI-driven solutions, marking a significant step in Codery's expansion.

items.title: AdScout Welcomes Google Veteran
items.body: AdScout, a Bulgarian startup, has recruited a former Google executive to address the 'trust tax' in advertising, indicating a strategic move to enhance its market position.

items.title: CEE's Role in Global AI
items.body: A prominent figure in the CEE tech scene emphasizes the region's strengths in applied engineering, positioning it as a key player in the global AI landscape.
